name: query-browser-credential-theft
bodyMarkdown:
# Browser Credential Theft Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1555.003, T1539 | **Log Sources:** Sysmon EID 11, EID 10

```kql
DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where FileName in ("Login Data", "Cookies", "Local State", "logins.json")
| where FolderPath has_any ("Chrome", "Edge", "Firefox", "Brave", "Opera")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in ("chrome.exe", "msedge.exe", "firefox.exe", "brave.exe", "opera.exe")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath, FileName, FolderPath
| sort by Timestamp desc
```
